issues.description: GiveKeyword for DoubleAttack should have duration "Permanent" (applies to the card for the rest of the game), not "EndOfTurn"
TrashFromHand action is missing the optional 'optional' flag. The card text says 'You may trash', indicating this is optional
TrashFromHand filter should not restrict to cardType "Character". The effect allows trashing any 2 cards from hand
The second action should add up to 1 card to Life cards (FlipLife), not SearchDeck to hand. Destination should be Life cards, not hand
TrashFromHand count should be 2 (trash 2 cards), but the action structure doesn't specify count
